oai_dc:dc.dc:title: Revive your “Why”: Reignite your professional purpose
oai_dc:dc.dc:creator: Davison, Andi
oai_dc:dc.dc:description: Purposeful work is essential for flourishing, defined as a bal­ance of personal well-being and professional efficacy. Purpose can be understood as “an intention to accomplish something meaningful to oneself with implications beyond oneself,” while meaning refers to the value or significance we attribute to our contributions (Mercurio, 2023; Seligman et al., 2003) . Dr. Mer­curio reminds us that meaningful work arises from intrinsic motivation – actions driven by personal values, interests and a genuine desire to contribute, as opposed to extrinsic motiva­tions like financial gain or social status. According to research, intrinsic motivation directly impacts not only performance but also overall well-being, empowering individuals to stay resil­ient and engaged over time (Figure 1. Ryan & Deci, 2000).
oai_dc:dc.dc:source: American Association of Bovine Practitioners Conference Proceedings; Vol. 58 No. 2 (2025): 2025 AABP Annual Conference Proceedings; 144
